description:
One Finger Death Punch 2 is a PC game made by Silver Dollar Games.
The concept is simple: one button to attack on your left, one button to attack on your right. Then you let the visuals do their magic.

0.1.1.description:
Bugfixes:
- Player could go to Map 7 or Map 6 from Map 8 after taking the other path, even though their map were still locked.
- after starting a game with a newly generated seed, but instantly quit, rebooting the game again would reset tutorial stages.
- On certain conditions, the map navigation could activate itself even though player doesn't have the required map items
- (ugly fix) Temporary fix for not receiving items after logging in during an async session.
0.1.1.title: 0.1.1b
